title: Alexander Potts
body: Alexander Desmond Potts FBA (aka: A.D. Potts or Alex Potts) is a Canadian art historian, known for his contributions to the field of aesthetics, history of sculpture and modern art.
categories: Academics of Camberwell College of Arts
